headline: The Zacks Analyst Blog  Western Digital, Seagate Technology and Sandisk
summary: Western Digital leads three beaten-down storage stocks as AI, cloud and data growth drive demand, with analysts pointing to sizable upside after a recent sector pullback.

headline: A Look At Seagate Technology Holdings (STX) Valuation After Recent Choppy Share Price Moves
summary: What recent returns say about Seagate Technology Holdings (STX) Seagate Technology Holdings (STX) has seen a 1 day return of 6.10%, while the stock shows a small 7 day pullback and a larger move lower over the past month, followed by a strong gain over the past 3 months. On a longer view, the stock shows positive total returns over 1 year, 3 years, and 5 years. This provides some context before you look more closely at revenue, earnings, and valuation metrics. headline: Seagate Mozaic 4 Plus HAMR Launch Ties Into Hyperscale Valuation Story
summary: Seagate Technology Holdings (NasdaqGS:STX) has launched its next-generation Mozaic 4+ HAMR-based storage platform. The company reports that Mozaic 4+ has reached volume production and has been qualified with leading hyperscale cloud providers. The platform is designed to support higher storage densities and data center efficiency for large-scale cloud and AI workloads. Seagate, a major supplier of hard disk drives and storage systems, is closely linked to trends in cloud computing and AI...
